questions.question: In "Homestuck" what is Dave Strider's guardian?
What is the alter-ego of the DC comics character "Superman"?
In the Marvel comic "The Superior Spider-Man", Peter Parker's body is taken over by which character?
Which "Green Arrow" sidekick commonly wears a baseball cap?
Who is the second person to take up the mantle of Night Owl in the Watchmen graphic novel?
Which pulp hero made appearances in Hellboy and BPRD comics before getting his own spin-off?
Who is the creator of the popular indie comic series 'The Walking Dead'?
questions.explanation: Robert Kirkman is the creator of 'The Walking Dead,' a highly acclaimed indie comic series that has been adapted into a successful television show. Kirkman's work has significantly impacted the comic book industry, showcasing the potential of indie comics to reach a broad audience.

questions.question: What storyline in DC Comics, published in 1986, is often credited with redefining Batman's character and achieving critical acclaim as one of the greatest graphic novels?
questions.explanation: Written by Frank Miller, 'The Dark Knight Returns' is a seminal work that revitalized Batman as a darker, more complex character. Its success helped pave the way for the modern era of graphic novels and influenced countless adaptations and portrayals of Batman in other media.
